title: Red Tagine with Caramelized Onions
description: A flavorful North African-inspired stew made with tender meat, sweet onions, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown, about 30 minutes.
Add algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add glistening beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the onions are tender and the liquid has thickened, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
